item.title: Version 1.6.5
item.description:
What's New in 1.6.5

Student Admission & Management

  • Complete Student Management: Added comprehensive Student Admission module with full CRUD operations for student records.
  • Student Model: Implemented Student Isar collection with 25+ fields covering Personal, Academic, Parent, and Fee information.
  • Student Service: Created StudentService for managing student records with duplicate check functionality.
  • Admission Form: Built comprehensive StudentAdmissionForm with grouped sections using TigleFormSection.
  • Management Dashboard: Integrated Student Management into the main ManagementScreen dashboard.
  • Searchable Dropdown: Replaced student input fields with searchable dropdown for better user experience.
  • Student Details Form: Enhanced student details form with improved UI and validation.

Responsive UI & Grouping

  • Responsive Layout: Overhauled Student Management to use a responsive grid/list layout that adapts to screen size.
  • Automatic Grouping: Students are now automatically grouped by their classroom for easier navigation.
  • Enhanced Cards: Student cards now display prominent Admission ID, Father's Name, Gender, and Phone numbers.
  • Eager Loading: Updated StudentService to eager-load classroom links for accurate grouping.

School Structure Improvements

  • Classroom Cards: Major UI overhaul to classroom cards with enhanced visual design and responsive behavior.
  • Section Column: Refined section column widget with improved layout and interaction patterns.
  • School Structure Screen: Optimized school structure screen with cleaner UI and better information hierarchy.
  • Pages Information: Added comprehensive pages information to school structure models and services.

Filtering

  • Filter Support: Added filtering capabilities to student management for enhanced data navigation.

Bug Fixes & Improvements

  • Layout Fix: Resolved "unbounded height" error on mobile by replacing Spacer() with fixed spacing in _StudentGridCard.
  • UI Clarity: Updated student card label from "ID:" to "Adm No:" for better clarity.
  • Android Version UI: Updated Android version display with improved visual design.
  • Code Cleanup: Significant refactoring and code cleanup across school structure screens (~150 lines reduced).

Configuration & Build

  • Version Bump: Updated to version 1.6.5.
  • Installer Updates: Updated desktop installer scripts and appcast configuration.
